g.text: 1) Traverse the list and while traversing maintain the previous node address.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2) By the time we reach the end of list, we will have two pointers to the tail and the other pointing to the node before list

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Update the next pointer of previous node to TAIL node with NULL
